zh.Saint Peter Churchyard, Prestbury, Chesh: 英國英格蘭爾普雷斯特波利
zh.Adlington, Cheshire, England: 英國英格蘭爾阿德林頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Legh VI於大約1428年出生在英國爾阿德林頓時，他的父親Robert de Legh V, Esq of Adlington19歲，母親Isabell Stanley18歲。他和Isabel Stanley, of Hooton至少有1個女兒。他去世於1486年12月8日在英國爾享年59歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭爾普雷斯特波利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert Legh VI于大约1428年出生在英国爾阿德林頓时，他的父亲Robert de Legh V, Esq of Adlington19岁，母亲Isabell Stanley18岁。他和Isabel Stanley, of Hooton至少有1个女儿。他去世于1486年12月8日在英国爾享年59岁，埋葬在英国英格兰爾普雷斯特波利。

nameMeanings.name: Legh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Leigh
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places (in at least sixteen counties, but especially Leigh in Lancashire) named either with the nominative case of Old English lēah ‘woodland clearing’ (see Lee ) or with lēage, a late dative form of this word (see Lye ).
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surname 李, based on its Cantonese pronunciation. See   Li   1.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Legh VI was born about 1428, in Adlington, Cheshire, England, his father, Robert de Legh V, Esq of Adlington, was 19 and his mother, Isabell Stanley, was 18. He had at least 1 daughter with Isabel Stanley, of Hooton. He died on 8 December 1486, in Cheshire, England, at the age of 59, and was buried in Prestbury, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert Legh VI est né environ 1428, à Adlington, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Robert de Legh V, Esq of Adlington, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Isabell Stanley, avait 18 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fille avec Isabel Stanley, of Hooton. Il est décédé le 8 décembre 1486, à Cheshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 59 ans, et a été enterré à Prestbury, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert Legh VI um 1428 in Adlington, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert de Legh V, Esq of Adlington 19 und seine Mutter Isabell Stanley 18. Er hatte mit Isabel Stanley, of Hooton mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb am 8. Dezember 1486 im Alter von 59 Jahren in Cheshire, England und wurde in Prestbury, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Legh VI è nato il circa 1428 nel Adlington, Cheshire, England, il suo padre, Robert de Legh V, Esq of Adlington, aveva 19 anni e il suo madre, Isabell Stanley, aveva 18 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlia con Isabel Stanley, of Hooton. Morì il 8 dicembre 1486, nel Cheshire, England, all'età di 59 anni, e fu sepolto a Prestbury, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert Legh VIが約1428年にイギリスチェシュアイアアドリントンで生まれた時，父Robert de Legh V, Esq of Adlingtonは19歳，母Isabell Stanleyは18歳であった。彼はIsabel Stanley, of Hootonとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1486年12月8日にイギリスチェシュアイアで59歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスチェシュアイアプレストブリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Legh VI(이)가 대략 1428년 영국 체실르 애들링턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert de Legh V, Esq of Adlington(은)는 19세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabell Stanley(은)는 18세였다. 그는 Isabel Stanley, of Hooton(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1486년 12월 8일 영국 체실르에서 59세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 프레스트버이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Legh VI nasceu aproximadamente 1428, em Adlington, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert de Legh V, Esq of Adlington, tinha 19 anos e sua mãe, Isabell Stanley, tinha 18 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filha com Isabel Stanley, of Hooton. Ele faleceu em 8 de dezembro de 1486, em Cheshire, Inglaterra, com 59 anos, e foi sepultado em Prestbury, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert Legh VI родился около 1428 г. в местности адлингтон, чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert de Legh V, Esq of Adlington было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabell Stanley, 18. У него была по крайней мере 1 дочь от Isabel Stanley, of Hooton. Он умер 8 декабря 1486 г. в местности чешир, Англия в возрасте 59 лет и был похоронен в местности престбури, чешир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert Legh VI nació aproximadamente 1428, en Adlington, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert de Legh V, Esq of Adlington, tenía 19 años y su mamá, Isabell Stanley, tenía 18 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hija con Isabel Stanley, of Hooton. Murió el 8 de diciembre de 1486, en Cheshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 59 años, y fue sepultado en Prestbury, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
